PowerShell($body = '{"input":{"sessionKey":"sess_690048481a694c2b9407bd6f515e73ec"}}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/ipc/middleware_chat_history" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; $json = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $m = $json.messages[1]; Write-Output "id: $\($m.id\)"; Write-Output "createdAt: $\($m.createdAt\)")
